title: ENPH Stock Jumps As New Microinverter Ignites Bullish Trading
text: Enphase Energy surged 12.62% as preorders opened for IQ9S-3P Commercial Microinverter targeting high-wattage panels and three-phase grids. Product announcement boosted investor confidence ahead of key tax credit deadline. Stock recovered from April low near $32 to approximately $51 by May 14 representing roughly 60% move driven by product news and short-covering rather than core business momentum. New commercial microinverter generated significant retail interest and trading volume surge.
